case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MARIA G. NIMER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT NIMER, MARIA G. $9,026.03 PRINCIPAL, $1,112.80 INTEREST, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,383.83, SEE SCANNED DOC

REPLY TO RESPONSE TO THE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT'S MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE JUDGMENT FOR PETITIONER, TREATED AS OPPOSITION TO PETITIONER'S PETITION, AND NO FURTHER OPPOSITION WAS FILED. RESPONDENT'S DECLARATION NOT UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY AND NO EVIDENCE PRESENTED THAT ARBITRATION AWARD IS NOT PROPER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE JUDGEMNT FOR PETITIONER AND ORDER CONFIRMING THE ARB AWARD AND ALLOW RESPONDENT TO FILE AN ANSWER, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT NIMER, MARIA G.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: HEARING CONTINUED FROM MAY-20-2010 TO JUN-03-2010. ANY ADDITIONAL OPPOSITION DUE 5/27/2010, SERVICE BY FAX ALLOWED; ANY REPLY DUE 6/1/2010. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC, ASSIGNEE OF MBNA AMERICA BANK, NA, Hearing regarding Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition to confirm arbitration award is Granted. Respondent's motion for order setting aside judgment for Petitioner, treated as opposition to Petitioner's petition, and no further opposition was filed. Respondent's Declaration not under penalty of perjury and no evidence presented that arbitration award is not proper. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Continued To Jun-03-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC Hearing Re: Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. Appearances: Respondent Maria G. Nimer, appearing in Pro Per and opposing party. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: Hearing continued to 6/3/2010. Any additional opposition due 5/27/2010, service by Fax allowed; Any reply due 6/1/2010. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
